newsitems.title: 🎉 20,000 Wishlists Reached — FAQ & Roadmap Update
newsitems.author: bahtiyar
newsitems.contents: 🎉 20,000 Wishlists Reached!Hello Ghost Hunters,Today, we're excited to share some amazing news.Give Us A Sign has officially reached 20,000 wishlists on Steam!To everyone who has followed our journey, watched our trailers, shared the game with friends, and joined our community thank you.As an independent studio, every wishlist, comment, and piece of feedback means a lot to us and helps us continue developing the game.With many new Ghost Hunters joining us recently, we thought this would be the perfect opportunity to celebrate this milestone and answer some of the questions we receive most often.👻 GIVE US A SIGN – FAQ & ROADMAP📅 When will the game release?Our current goal is to release the official demo during Steam Next Fest this October.Following the demo, we are targeting an Early Access launch approximately 3–4 months later.These dates may change as development continues, but this is our current plan.👻 How many ghosts will be in the game?We are currently planning around 20 unique paranormal entities for Give Us A Sign.Players will be able to encounter 8 different entities in the Steam Next Fest demo.Each entity features its own:BehaviorsStrengths and weaknessesEvidence typesParanormal eventsHunting patternsOur goal isn't simply to have more ghosts it's to make each one feel unique and memorable.🎮 Is the game coming to consoles?Yes.Our current plan is to launch on PC first and then bring Give Us A Sign to PlayStation and Xbox as soon as possible afterward.This approach allows us to gather community feedback and deliver a more polished experience on consoles.🔄 Will there be cross-platform support?Cross-platform support remains one of our major goals.While we're not ready to make any final promises yet, the game is being developed with this possibility in mind.🌍 What languages will be supported?Give Us A Sign supports multiple languages, including those currently listed on our Steam page.Because the game features voice-reactive mechanics, we also plan to expand voice-language support after Early Access whenever possible.😱 How does replayability work?Our goal is not just to create scary moments.We want every investigation to feel tense, unpredictable, and replayable.Entity behavior, paranormal events, and investigation outcomes can change depending on many factors, helping each session feel different from the last.No two investigations should feel exactly the same.🛠️ Do you use AI to make the game?No.No AI-generated content is used for our maps, entities, environments, gameplay systems, or playable content.Everything you experience in-game is created by our team.We occasionally use AI-assisted tools for marketing and community management so we can spend more time developing the game itself.AI helps us work faster.It does not decide what game we make.🚧 What's Next?Over the coming months, we'll continue sharing:New gameplay footageNew entity revealsDevelopment updatesBehind-the-scenes contentSteam Next Fest preparationsMore screenshots and gameplay detailsWe still have a lot to show you.📱 Bonus Preview: Tablet Journal A first look at our Tablet Journal system.The Tablet Journal allows Ghost Hunters to review evidence, track objectives, identify entities, and manage investigations directly from an in-game tablet. ❤️ Support the ProjectThe best ways to support Give Us A Sign are:✅ Wishlist the game on Steam✅ Join our Discord community✅ Follow our social media channels✅ Check out all our platforms through Linktree✅ Share the game with fellow Ghost Hunters linktr.ee/GiveUsASignEvery wishlist, share, and piece of feedback genuinely helps us continue development.Thank you once again for helping us reach 20,000 wishlists.This is only the beginning.— Give Us A Sign

newsitems.title: Give Us A Sign - Official Announcement Trailer !

newsitems.contents: The official announcement trailer for Give Us A Sign is finally here! Dive into the mystery, analyze the hidden clues within the video, and add the game to your Wishlist now!

newsitems.title: Give Us A Sign – Teaser Coming Soon
newsitems.author: bahtiyar
newsitems.contents: We’re currently working hard on the upcoming teaser for Give Us A Sign.We’re excited to share it with you very soon.Your feedback and support mean a lot to us and play an important role in shaping the game.If you’d like to get early updates and stay closer to development, you can follow us on our social media channels and Discord. LinktreeAnd if you haven’t already, don’t forget to wishlist the game. Demir Games

newsitems.title: Development Update & Future Plans
newsitems.author: demirgamesofficial
newsitems.contents: Hey everyone,Today, we’d like to share our current development progress and future plans for Give Us A Sign.Our goal is not simply to create another ghost hunting game, but to deliver a deeper, more atmospheric, and highly replayable paranormal investigation experience. Console Development Plans Give Us A Sign is also being developed with future console support in mind.Our team has prior experience with PlayStation porting and console optimization, and we are building the game’s technical foundation accordingly from the start.However, our current priority is delivering the strongest possible PC experience first before moving toward console versions. Demo & Playtest GoalsOur goal is for the demo to feel like a polished, complete experience rather than a small test build.The demo is planned to include:• 1 Tutorial Map • 1 Safe House • 1 Full Investigation / Gameplay Map If possible, we also aim to include mini-games and additional systems within the Safe House for the demo.If not, these features will definitely be included in Early Access.While the demo will not contain every ghost type, cosmetic, or all final planned content, it will provide enough depth to properly represent the full game experience.Before the demo release, we also plan to run multiple Steam Playtest sessions.This will allow us to:• Gather community feedback early • Better balance our systems • Improve player experience before launch Voice Interaction & Modular Paranormal SystemsOne of the core pillars of Give Us A Sign is its voice-driven paranormal interaction system.Your voice will not simply be used for communication—it will actively become part of the gameplay experience and paranormal world.Through this system:• Your voice can trigger paranormal activity • Initiate specific supernatural events • Attract the attention of nearby ghosts • Cause the environment to react in different ways All of this is supported by our fully modular horror and environmental event system.This means:• Paranormal events are dynamic rather than scripted • Environmental scares can trigger in multiple combinations • Each session can create unique scenarios Our goal is for every encounter to feel unpredictable, immersive, and highly replayable. Ghost Depth & Investigation MechanicsFor us, it is not enough for ghosts to simply differ by name.Every ghost within our lore is being deeply designed around its own mythology, folklore, and paranormal background.Each one will not only behave differently, but will also reflect its authentic mythological and supernatural traits through gameplay.This means players will need to do more than rely on equipment—they must investigate, study behaviors, and understand what they are facing in order to properly identify it.Our goal is for every ghost encounter to feel like more than just a scare, but a paranormal case that must be solved. Post-Demo PlansAfter the demo launches, our focus will be:• Gathering community feedback • Improving and balancing systems • Polishing the remaining maps • Pushing the game toward final production quality Early Access GoalsOur planned Early Access version will include:• 1 Tutorial Map • 3 Investigation Maps • 1 Expanded Safe House This is only the beginning.Thank you for your continued support 🤍 Demir Games
